title: "These Stones Shall Be For A Memorial" Joshua 4:1-24

notes.introduction: An exposition of Joshua 4:1-24 on the two stone memorials erected after Israel's crossing of the Jordan River, with application to the church ordinances of the Lord's Supper and baptism as memorials of Christ's death and resurrection. Preached on Memorial Day weekend, drawing a parallel between national memorials and the responsibility to instruct future generations in the works of God.
themes: the power of god in miracles

sections.heading: Memorial Day and the Jordan Crossing
The Place of the Two Memorials
The Danger of a Generation That Forgot
